page.content: The table presents data on IgG levels across various conditions, detailing SPOROZOITES/WELL, MEAN ± SDa, and % INHIBITIONb. For the row labeled PRE-IMMUNE, the values are 522, 514, 593, yielding a mean of 543 ± 35 and 0% inhibition. The second MB2-B row shows values of 205, 251, 238, resulting in a mean of 231 ± 19 and 57% inhibition. The MB2-Cc row is not applicable, showing no data. In the subsequent PRE-IMMUNE row, the values are 216, 312, 240, with a mean of 256 ± 40 and 0% inhibition. The MB2-C row lists values of 252, 177, 198, resulting in a mean of 209 ± 31 and 18% inhibition. The MB2-FAc row also shows no data. In the PRE-IMMUNE row, the values are 472, 485, 438, leading to a mean of 465 ± 20 and 0% inhibition.

page.content: The MB2-FA row presents values of 263, 354, 306, with a mean of 307 ± 37 and 33% inhibition. The mAb NFS1 row shows values of 11, 9, 6, yielding a mean of 8 ± 2 and 97% inhibition. Finally, the MEMdControl row contains values of 280, 350, 325, resulting in a mean of 318 ± 29 and 0% inhibition. This comprehensive data illustrates the varying IgG responses across different conditions and the corresponding inhibitory effects.
